name: Jat Kusar
description: Overwhelm hostiles with this jet-powered sickle and razor-chain weapon. Charged strikes ignite an explosive blast at range.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Overwhelm hostiles with this jet-powered sickle and razor-chain weapon. Charged strikes ignite an explosive blast at range.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Jat Kusar default holster position clipping inside Trinity Strega skin.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Jat Kusar Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Improved Jat Kusar weapon trail so that it is more visible.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes issues with the angle of the Jat Kusar slam FX.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Jat Kusar charge attack exploding in your face if invisible.
